from sqlalchemy import create_engine
from sqlalchemy.pool import QueuePool

DB_MAX_CONNECTIONS = 50
APP_INSTANCES = 4
PER_INSTANCE_POOL = DB_MAX_CONNECTIONS // APP_INSTANCES

engine = create_engine(
    "postgresql://user:pass@db-host:5432/mydb",
    poolclass=QueuePool,
    pool_size=PER_INSTANCE_POOL,
    max_overflow=5,
    pool_timeout=10,
    pool_recycle=3600,
)

engine_readonly = create_engine(
    "postgresql://user:pass@db-readonly:5432/mydb",
    poolclass=QueuePool,
    pool_size=PER_INSTANCE_POOL,
    max_overflow=5,
)
